description: CompositionBlack track jacket with white and grey panels, made of 100% polyester, has a mock neck, full raglan sleeves with ribbed cuffs, full front zipper, pockets on the sides, ribbed hem and embroidered brand logo on the left chestFittingRegularWash careGentle machine wash in cool waterDo not bleach or tumble dryCool ironDo not dry cleanDesigned to offer exemplary snug comfort during your training sessions, this track jacket from puma oozes sporty attitude. Team it with track pants or layer it over jeans and t-shirts.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
